name: Gnocchi Al Gorgonzola (Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare gnocchi according to a gnocchi recipe.
2. Bring a pot of salted water to a boil and warm a bowl.
3. Add gorganzola to the bowl with butter and a pinch of pepper. Blend until creamy using a wooden spoon.
4. Stir in parmesan and heated cream. Keep warm.
5. Add gnocchi carefully to boiling water. Stir and cook briskly.
6. When they come to the surface, remove with a slotted spoon and transfer to the bowl with the sauce.
7. Stir well to coat with sauce and serve immediately.
